symbols.name: GuidGenerator
symbols.summary: Provides methods to generate GUIDs based on specific values or using sequential creation logic.

symbols.name: Create(string)
symbols.summary: Generates a GUID based on the provided string value.

parameters.description: The input string used to generate the GUID. If the value is null, an empty GUID is returned.

returns.description: A GUID generated from the input string. If the value is null, returns Guid.Empty.

parameters.description: The input string used to generate the GUID. If the value is null, an empty GUID is returned.

returns.description: A GUID generated from the input string. If the value is null, returns Guid.Empty.
